overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic city street in Night City during golden hour. The character passes various commercial buildings including DATA INC, yellow facades with vending machines, and red brick structures with street vendors while futuristic traffic moves along the multi-lane road.

futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk past the DATA INC building and futuristic street lights

modern commercial building with purple neon DATA INC signage
distinctive orange tactile paving tiles along the pedestrian walkway
tall yellow pole with modern lighting fixtures
tropical palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a character in white crossing the view, then follows a walking character along an orange-tiled sidewalk in a futuristic commercial district. The DATA INC building with purple neon signage dominates the right side while a tall cylindrical tower rises across the multi-lane street. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the road as the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with yellow facade and vending machines

events.description: passing by green vending machines embedded in the yellow building wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the concrete sidewalk past the yellow commercial building with neon signage and vending machines

entered.detail: bright yellow building facade with large windows and commercial signage
futuristic green automated vending machines with glowing displays
red neon sign reading TURBO mounted on the building facade
tall infrastructure pole with cables and lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a yellow commercial building section with distinctive green vending machines and a red TURBO neon sign. The ground changes from orange tiles to concrete with scattered debris. The camera continues walking forward as the DATA INC building recedes behind, and the tall tower becomes more distant across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial area with street vendors and red brick buildings

events.description: passing street vendor stall with green canopy where people are gathered
approaching intersection with increased pedestrian and vehicle activity

agents.ego_description: walking past the red brick building and street vendor area toward the intersection with the elevated pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink pants standing near the green vendor canopy
person sitting on outdoor bench near large cactus plants

entered.detail: tall red brick apartment building with external air conditioning units and fire escapes
green awning over street vendor stall with people gathered underneath
illuminated sign for Smash Cheezits restaurant on yellow building facade
futuristic elevated walkway structure crossing over the street ahead
tall cactus plants in planters outside the commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a denser commercial area with a prominent red brick building housing street vendors under a green canopy. The camera passes pedestrians including a person in pink pants near the vendor stall and someone sitting on a bench by large cactus plants. The Smash Cheezits sign becomes visible as the camera approaches an intersection with an elevated pedestrian bridge spanning the road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic commercial district that shifts from a sleek corporate corridor into a denser, more eclectic street market. It begins by following a character along an orange-tiled sidewalk dominated by the purple neon signage of the DATA INC building and a towering cylindrical structure across the road. As the camera moves forward, the environment transitions to a yellow building section featuring green vending machines and a red TURBO sign, while the ground shifts from tiles to concrete scattered with debris. The scene then expands into a busier area characterized by red brick buildings and street vendors under green canopies, passing pedestrians and large cactus plants. Finally, the camera approaches a city intersection beneath an elevated pedestrian bridge as a Smash Cheezits sign comes into view.
